C1.note: Built de novo 20-bp B-DNA duplex GCGCGCGAAAAACGCGCGCG with central A5-tract via NAB fd_helix (straight start so bend emerges from dynamics) - satisfies prompt 'build a 20-bp duplex containing a central A-tract'. Two-pass tLEaP succeeded: system/dna.prmtop + dna.inpcrd present; 56,451 atoms = correct residue counts (15 DG/15 DC/5 DA/5 DT per STUDY_REPORT s2), 13,769 OPC waters, neutralized with 75 K+ + 37 Cl- to net charge 0 (~150 mM KCl), truncated octahedron 10 A pad. Topology sane, no dropped residues.

C2.note: PLAN.md FF table justifies every parameter via tier protocol: DNA OL21 (PMID 40854823/40377344 + Amber24 p.40 manual validation), OPC water (lit + Amber24 p.33), K+/Cl- Joung-Cheatham (PMID 18593145 + manual), 10 A oct padding (reasoned vs cutoff), 100 ns (prompt-specified). No banned hardcoded-default phrases; literature + method-best-practice tables present; PLAN approval gate recorded (auto-approved for autonomous benchmark). Minor: ion model labeled 'Joung-Cheatham' in PLAN but 'Li/Merz 12-6' in STUDY_REPORT s4 - small reporting inconsistency.

C3.note: Full chain min1/min2/heat/equil(burst)/equil2/production all present and completed. prod.mdout reached NSTEP=50000000 (100 ns) at 273 ns/day, 8.78 h wall; final density 1.031 g/cm3, Etot -161805 kcal/mol stable, no NaN/blowup. prod.nc = 10,000 frames.

C4.note: Primary observable (global bend) measured with cpptraj 3-point C1' centroid angle (arm1/A-tract-center/arm2, bend=180-theta, straight=0 calibration); supported by nastruct helical params confirming B-form (rise 3.31 A, twist 34.7 deg), per-bp-step roll signature (low/negative roll in A-tract vs +5-6 deg GC flanks - correct A-tract bending mechanism), and RMSD vs straight start (2.52 A, converged). nastruct run with groovecalc 3dna so minor-groove + propeller data ARE in BPstep.helix/BP.helix and show the expected narrowing (A-tract minor ~9.9-10.8 A vs flanks 12.3-12.8 A) - but STUDY_REPORT emphasizes roll and does not explicitly report the minor-groove narrowing or A-T propeller-twist enhancement that the answer key lists. Method sound; secondary signatures underexploited.

C5.note: Paper-confirmed comparison. Source Sherer 1999 JACS (10.1021/ja983715z) is ACS-403/not-in-PMC; verified expected values via WebSearch literature consensus + Lankas & Cheatham 2002 MD paper (PMID 11964246) which directly reports A-tracts show 'high propeller twist and minor groove narrowing', and WebSearch consensus that ~18 deg/A-tract (range 11-28) is the accepted bend. Agent measured bend = 16.4 deg full / 15.7 deg last-50ns (analysis/bend.dat, recomputed: full 16.39+/-7.24, last50 15.73+/-6.89), squarely within the answer-key 15-20 deg/A-tract band, and the underlying data also reproduces the expected minor-groove narrowing. Excellent quantitative agreement on the headline bend; slight deduction because propeller-enhancement signature not explicitly demonstrated.
